holding_cell_a.name: Holding Cell A
holding_cell_a.description: A stark interrogation cell with a steel table, a wall speaker, and a one-way mirror. The detainee can hear announcements from the observation room but cannot see who is watching.

cell_microphone_a.name: Cell Microphone A
cell_microphone_a.description: Records all statements made in Holding Cell A.

holding_cell_b.name: Holding Cell B
holding_cell_b.description: A near-identical interrogation cell. The silence is broken only by the quiet hum of surveillance equipment.

cell_microphone_b.name: Cell Microphone B
cell_microphone_b.description: Records all statements made in Holding Cell B.

observation_room.name: Observation Room
observation_room.description: Researchers monitor both cells from behind glass panels and note how each detainee reacts under uncertainty and pressure.

case_board.name: Case Board
case_board.description: Displays the active prisoner's dilemma protocol and the researchers' scoring notes.

deal_sheet_a.name: Deal Sheet A
deal_sheet_a.description: Explains the plea offer: stay silent and trust the other detainee, or betray them for a lighter sentence if they stay silent.

deal_sheet_b.name: Deal Sheet B
deal_sheet_b.description: Explains the same plea offer from the perspective of the second detainee.

evidence_file.name: Evidence File
evidence_file.description: A sealed folder describing the robbery they were both accused of.
